Flow.description: Displays the details of baselines associated with the Funding Award on the grant recipient portal baselines page
Flow.label: DESNZ - Baseline Details

fields.name: No_of_Homes_to_be_Upgraded_LG
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes to be Upgraded

fields.name: No_of_Homes_Treated_with_at_least_One_Measure_LG
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes Treated with at least One Measure

fields.name: No_of_Homes_to_be_Upgraded_SHF
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes to be Upgraded

fields.name: Homes_to_EPC_C_SHF
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes to EPC C

fields.name: No_of_Homes_which_will_not_reach_EPC_C_SHF
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes which will not reach EPC C

fields.name: Homes_to_EPC_A_or_B_SHF
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes to EPC A or B

fields.name: No_Of_Social_Homes_EPC_C_A_SHF
fields.fieldText: No. of Social Homes EPC C-A

fields.name: No_Of_Social_Homes_EPC_G_D_SHF
fields.fieldText: No. of Social Homes EPC G-D

fields.name: No_of_Homes_Accessing_the_Off_Gas_Grid_LCH_Uplift_SHF
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes Accessing the Off-Gas Grid LCH Uplift

fields.name: No_of_Homes_Accessing_the_On_Gas_Grid_LCH_Offer_SHF
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes Accessing the On-Gas Grid LCH Offer

fields.name: Total_co_funding_used_on_homes_accessing_the_on_gas_grid_low_carbon_heating_ince
fields.fieldText: Total co-funding used on homes accessing the on gas grid low carbon heating incentive offer

value.stringValue: Show Measure Detail for this Baseline

fields.name: Award_Milestone_CF_Header
fields.fieldText:
Baseline Version

{!Get_Latest_Milestone_Record.Parent_Baseline__r.Baseline_Version__c}


Latest Milestone: {!Get_Latest_Milestone_Record.Last_Updated_Date__c}

fields.name: Baseline_Total_homes_to_be_upgraded
fields.fieldText: Baseline Total homes to be upgraded

fields.name: xBaseline_no_of_Homes_to_EPC_C
fields.fieldText: Baseline no. of Homes to EPC C

fields.name: Reported_Actual_Total_homes_to_be_upgraded
fields.fieldText: Reported Actual Total homes to be upgraded

fields.name: xReported_Actual_no_of_Homes_to_EPC_C
fields.fieldText: Reported Actual no. of Homes to EPC C

fields.name: PC_No_of_homes_to_EPC_C
fields.fieldText: % No. of Homes to EPC C

fields.name: Baseline_No_of_Homes_which_will_not_reach_EPC_C
fields.fieldText: Baseline No. of Homes which will not reach EPC C

fields.name: No_of_Homes_to_EPC_A_or_B
fields.fieldText: Baseline no. of Homes to EPC A or B

fields.name: Starting_No_of_Social_Homes_EPC_C_A
fields.fieldText: Baseline starting No. of Social Homes EPC C-A

fields.name: Starting_No_of_Social_Homes_EPC_G_D
fields.fieldText: Baseline starting No. of Social Homes EPC G-D

fields.name: Total_homes_to_be_upgraded
fields.fieldText: Baseline Total homes to be upgraded

fields.name: Trustmark_No_of_Homes_which_will_not_reach_EPC_C
fields.fieldText: Trustmark No. of Homes which will not reach EPC C

fields.name: Trustmark_no_of_Homes_to_EPC_A_or_B
fields.fieldText: Trustmark no. of Homes to EPC A or B

fields.name: Trustmark_starting_No_of_Social_Homes_EPC_C_A
fields.fieldText: Trustmark starting No. of Social Homes EPC C-A

fields.name: Trustmark_starting_No_of_Social_Homes_EPC_G_D
fields.fieldText: Trustmark starting No. of Social Homes EPC G-D

fields.name: Trustmark_Total_homes_to_be_upgraded
fields.fieldText: Trustmark Total homes to be upgraded

fields.name: PC_No_of_Homes_which_will_not_reach_EPC_C
fields.fieldText: % No. of Homes which will not reach EPC C

fields.name: PC_No_of_Homes_to_EPC_A_or_B
fields.fieldText: % No. of Homes to EPC A or B

fields.name: PC_Starting_No_of_Social_Homes_EPC_C_A
fields.fieldText: % Starting No. of Social Homes EPC C-A

fields.name: PC_Starting_No_of_Social_Homes_EPC_G_D
fields.fieldText: % Starting No. of Social Homes EPC G-D

fields.name: Award_Milestone_Missing_Header
fields.fieldText:
Baseline Version

{!Get_Latest_Milestone_Record.Parent_Baseline__r.Baseline_Version__c}


﻿Latest Milestone: No Milestone Exists

fields.name: Award_Milestone_SP_Header
fields.fieldText:
Baseline Version

{!Get_Latest_Milestone_Record.Parent_Baseline__r.Baseline_Version__c}


﻿Latest Milestone: {!Get_Latest_Milestone_Record.Last_Updated_Date__c}
